title: sambucus buergeriana
intro: Sambucus buergeriana, also known as the Korean elder or Japanese elder, is a species of flowering plant in the family Adoxaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sambucus buergeriana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as colds and flu. Sambucus buergeriana is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
